storyInfo: Dark tides brew below the surface of Baizao's rebuilding effort. The writing knife disappears, and Chun learns during the search that Jie's powers have been growing. The rebuilding of Baizao runs into obstacles, and a rift develops between Yan and the proxies.

attributes.content: ...I see.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Do not tell anyone else. Be extremely careful.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: I need you to do something for me.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: The Judicial Review Office has begun to investigate everyone who was near the Sky Mirror Pavilion around the time that the writing knife was stolen.
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: Outside of our siblings, you could count the number of people who know about the existence of the knife with one hand.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Yes, it's just as I feared.
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: I won't stand aside and do nothing if someone tries to harm you, Jie.
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: I doubt someone trying to harm me would use such means.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: It feels more like a warning.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: His Imperial Majesty is an energetic ruler. He wanted every 'person' in the land to bow to him. He would recognize our family as not being of his kind.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: But I do not believe he would stoop so low as to use the knife in underhanded ways.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: It's not fair. If there's anyone who should be above suspicion, it would be you.
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: You know how hard the words 'fair and just' are to write... it's as our oldest brother says. There is little point in arguing when it's a thousand mouths against one.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: I doubt he would just let this slide, if he was here.
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: Hehe...
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: I wouldn't like to see him when he's angry.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: What is your plan? You won't tell Wang about it?
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: It's times like these that he is most useful.
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: Jie shakes her head.
That was what I was about to ask you... please, keep this a secret from Wang.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: People have feared and avoided him for many years. His position has grown even more precarious under the new emperor. This is not the time to drag him into this.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Besides, I fear he will do something irrational if he finds out.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Alright, I'll listen to you.
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: But I hope you can be honest with me, Jie.
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: Are you absolutely sure that you and Wang are not plotting something?
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: Come on, don't interrogate me like this, sister.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: I guess no one can lie to you successfully.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: I knew it.
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: You understand that it's a dangerous power you wield.
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: I know the risks. But I'm not the only one who has to shoulder them.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Shuo, Wang, Ling and you... you've done so much for us the younger ones. I have to do my part.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Besides, I don't want these names that I put so much thought into to fade away in history.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Jun continues to frown. Jie takes her sister's hands in hers. They are rough from all the years of playing instruments, but it is a comfortable feeling.
I'm here. I'm alright.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Don't worry...
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: You know, I had a dream, a dream about our future.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: It's a different future from the fields of white that Shu spoke of.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: I saw all of you truly live as yourselves.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: The vision was so real, it didn't seem like a dream. I even have a feeling...
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: A feeling that it's more than just a dream...
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: It's good to see you, Miss Nian.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Hey, Round-head. You're the one supervising the work?
attributes.name: Nian

attributes.content: What about the 'foreman'? Where's he slacking off?
attributes.name: Nian

attributes.content: You misunderstand. My master has been very busy with city design ever since he received news of Baizao's modification. He has gone an entire month without sleep at his busiest.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: That slowpoke picks himself up once in a while, eh?
attributes.name: Nian

attributes.content: He calls Yan's first-ever nomadic city a project of monumental significance. Every detail of the city must be carefully considered.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Therefore, he must complete it before you have a chance to do something to his design.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: What the—!
attributes.name: Nian

attributes.content: How dare he talk behind my back like this, when I always share the good stuff with him?!
attributes.name: Nian

attributes.content: Where is he? I'll bite his head off for this—
attributes.name: Nian

attributes.content: Sleeping.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: He has slept for ten days now, but he is supposed to deliver the draft of the gates to the Ministry of Works today.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: He told me that I am to stop the ministry's people from getting in, no matter what.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Ha! Now that's the Yi I know.
attributes.name: Nian

attributes.content: Is there something else?
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: You said Yi's sleeping...
attributes.name: Nian

attributes.content: I remember that he picked up a meteorite a few decades ago... it's still in his garden, isn't it? Where?
attributes.name: Nian

attributes.content: Miss Nian... I have my master's instructions. I am not to allow anyone into the Garden of Grotesqueries, whether it is you or anyone from the Ministry of Works.
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Why are you so loyal to him? Say, wasn't it I who gave him the materials to build your body? You should obey MY orders!
attributes.name: Nian

attributes.content: Now shut up and get out of the way!
attributes.name: Nian

attributes.content: Please, Miss Nian... you make my position most difficult—
attributes.name: Liang

attributes.content: Mr. Liang, Miss Nian. The Assistant Minister requests your urgent presence at the Forbidden City.
attributes.name: Ministry of Works Official

attributes.content: Urgent? How much?
attributes.name: Nian

attributes.content: The Baizao project has encountered a snag...
attributes.name: Ministry of Works Official

attributes.content: A shipment of materials, Oriron and Originium and the like, which Baizao urgently needs, has been delayed.
attributes.name: Ministry of Works Official

attributes.content: It has brought construction to a grinding halt.
attributes.name: Ministry of Works Official

attributes.content: What the...
attributes.name: Nian

attributes.content: What are the geezers at the Ministry of Works doing?
attributes.name: Nian

attributes.content: What is going on... I demand an explanation!
attributes.name: Minister of Works

attributes.content: The construction of Baizao is the most important thing in the land! How could this be allowed to happen?!
attributes.name: Minister of Works

attributes.content: The Chidao around the capital is well-maintained. How could it collapse when no Catastrophe has occurred? And how could there be bandits so close to the capital?
attributes.name: Minister of Works

attributes.content: I have to say that these incidents are highly suspicious, sir.
attributes.name: Skeptical Ministry of Works Official

attributes.content: The sudden collapse, and the supplies that disappeared without reason, then showed up just as suddenly where they should not...
attributes.name: Skeptical Ministry of Works Official

attributes.content: If there is indeed someone behind all this, then their objective must be to sow confusion.
attributes.name: Skeptical Ministry of Works Official

attributes.content: Rumors have been spreading in the city. Many workers believe that Baizao picked a time of ill fortune to begin construction.
attributes.name: Skeptical Ministry of Works Official

attributes.content: Someone is sowing confusion? Who?
attributes.name: Minister of Works

attributes.content: Sir, the Minister of Rites requests a meeting.
attributes.name: Anxious Ministry of Works Official

attributes.content: What is Rites doing here at a time like this? Did they come to laugh at us?
attributes.name: Minister of Works

attributes.content: Reporting, sir: the Minister of Rites said that although the Ministry of Works has been quite busy of late, this trouble involves more than just the Ministry of Works...
attributes.name: Anxious Ministry of Works Official

attributes.content: There you are, Chun.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: Do you know why I have summoned you?
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: I suppose... it's because of the writing knife.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Yes.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: How do you propose to solve this dilemma?
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: Perhaps, if you could... put in a few good words for her, and return it to its owner...
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Ha.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: Go on.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: If the numbers are the problem, it's as simple a matter as going over her head to alter them... this should not be necessary.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: How interesting. Her previous Candleholder retired after being accused of growing too close to her proxy... she has a knack for winning people over, doesn't she?
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: She... I mean, all the proxies have their own eccentricities. But they have never plotted against Yan—
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Indeed, we can tolerate the eccentricities of others, as long as they do not seek to harm Yan.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: But she...
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: You must understand what you are dealing with, and what her powers mean to Yan.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: The Supervisor tosses the unsubmitted document towards Chun, and hands her a writing brush dipped in ink.
Try.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: Try, if you think you can go over the head of the proxy. Change the numbers to what you want them to be.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: Your Imperial Majesty... the Ministries of Rites and Works have completed the investigation into the lost supplies for the Baizao project.
attributes.name: Ministry of Rites Official

attributes.content: The investigators unanimously agree that it was most likely an intentional act... and that there was someone behind it.
attributes.name: Ministry of Rites Official

attributes.content: The supplies have arrived at Baizao. The Ministry of Works will do its best to make up for lost progress...
attributes.name: Ministry of Rites Official

attributes.content: What are you hiding?
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: You suspect that there is someone behind it. You must have a suspect.
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: The nervous official dares not look straight at the figure behind the curtain. Out of the corner of the eye, he glimpses his majestic lord standing before his desk, writing something.
A well-timed declaration of war. Two, in fact.
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: One, telling me that she is the sole mouth of Yan, while the other demonstrating that he can easily disrupt Yan's greatest project, that the continuation of the project depends on his approval.
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: Will there come a day when they could make Yan's armies turn on themselves if they wanted?
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: This is a most serious matter, Your Majesty. If the proxies are indeed stirring trouble, the Sui Regulator should act immediately and punish them severely.
attributes.name: Ministry of Rites Official

attributes.content: There is no need to be hasty.
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: The figure behind the curtain thinks for a moment, then puts down his writing brush.
I know the craft of calligraphy must be honed over a long period, but I have not seen the efforts bear fruit...
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: Still, I understand now why the Grand Preceptor wanted me to spend so much time on it.
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: One must be in control of oneself.
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: The young True Lung gazes upon the ink on the paper, but he seems dissatisfied and frowns.
'Jin Ye Ming Yue Ren Jin Wang'—The moon's wan gloom drew every eye.
He picks up the writing knife and uses it to scrape away the conspicuous character of 'Wang'.
In an instant, that patch of paper is white as new again.
He is clever, unlike his pedantic sister. He knew to let the supplies arrive at Baizao eventually, make a show of good faith.
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: He wished to protest on behalf of his sister. I'll humor his brotherly love. They can record the figures as they like.
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: As for this writing knife...
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: I had considered doing something with it, but...
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: Never mind. Return it.
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: Jie...
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: The Sui Regulator has recovered your item.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Thank you.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: I'm so sorry, Jie...
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Why apologize? You found the thing that I lost.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: That which was lost has been restored. All is well.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: I was negligent in my duty.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: There's something I've always wanted to ask you, Jie.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: You said you didn't want to use the writing knife to alter history, not even to change clerical errors. Why have you kept the knife around?
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Did you forget that you already asked this question when you were three months on the job? You complained when I didn't allow you to use the writing knife to correct errors.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: I-Is that so? I don't really remember...
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Have you forgotten about your original aspiration, now that the erroneous descriptions of Yaan Elves have been addressed?
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: No, I just...
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: It's true that one should not pursue what lies in the past. But just as you and I have demonstrated, it does not mean that we should ignore the errors of the past, never mind trying to whitewash them.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: I have kept the knife so that people will remember that wrongs can always be righted.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: ...I understand.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Nothing could be changed... tearing the pages out, writing over the words, they all do nothing because the page is instantly restored to its original state... how could this be?
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: How could this be?
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: This is her power.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: She was not so difficult a hundred years ago, when it was proposed that she should leave the Imperial Historical Cabinet and refrain from writing the histories directly.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: She did not complain, and indeed transferred to the Sky Mirror Pavilion of her own accord to work on reviews. She also reduced the number of courses she taught at the Academy, mostly working in an advisory capacity, similar to how Jun operates.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: But her photographic memory, enthusiasm for history, and her immortality, were too much of a temptation to historians.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: It became their habit to seek the approval of the one who is never wrong, and she is happy to take on the work, reviewing documents and histories...
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: Today, nothing that passes through her hands can be altered without her approval.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: As for the writing knife that occupies so much of your mind... it was once an ordinary tool, when Jie first picked it up.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: After spending centuries by Jie's side, it became capable of altering text without having to carve out bamboo.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: Two centuries later, the writing knife accidentally erased a page from the veritable records of a True Lung.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: Few, if any, ever perused those pages, and all who knew the subject were gone. And so, when a careless historian's hand slipped, no one could recall what the page held anymore.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: One reason was that no copies were made of the veritable records. But it is also true that Jie's powers are growing.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: If the Sui Regulator, or Jie herself, chooses to erase a word, a sentence, or perhaps a memory from under heaven with it... it is well within the realm of possibility.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: The knife represents only a fragment of Jie's powers. How fast are her own powers growing?
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: The deeper Yan's history grows, the harder it will become to rein her in, for she is one with history.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: In another century or ten, as she continues to immerse herself in history, she will become more powerful, more terrible, even than the bestial Sui Itself.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: The long-lived Candleholder stands dumbfounded, hardly able to comprehend what she has just heard.
If that's all, I will return to the Sky Mirror Pavilion.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Very well. Be careful.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Wang...?
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Are you alright?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: I'm fine.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Wang, did you...?
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Silence. They have grown used to this tacit understanding between them, in the long centuries that they have spent together.
Jie clearly sees the emotions in his eyes.
Flames of fury, well-hidden, but burning nonetheless.
It happened a century ago. I still remember the conflict that occurred because of the writing knife.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: What is it that you want me to see, this time?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.text: I thought you would charge recklessly into the dream and tear it apart.
You call yourself a schemer. Did you not see how the seeds of your end were already sown?
The hearts of men are fickle...

attributes.content: I don't need you to tell me.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: So you did not interfere in my power struggle against the True Lung.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.text: Does it matter that you know? You dug your own grave. I did not need to do anything.
Besides, you have not seen the full picture of how the event led to her ultimate demise.
The end is near. Are you ready?
